description_long: This is a rectangular, beige-colored storage cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring two sliding doors on the front. The cabinet is constructed from what appears to be wood or a wood-like material, with a smooth, matte finish. Each sliding door is equipped with a small, rectangular metallic handle for easy access to the interior. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The top surface is flat and can be used to support additional objects or decor. This type of cabinet is commonly found in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public facilities for secure storage.
description: A beige, rectangular storage cabinet with two sliding doors and metallic handles, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sliding doors with metallic handles and a flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, solid panel.
